testcase.name: test_ffmpeg_available

failure.message: AssertionError: ffmpeg binary not found on PATH — OGG->MP3 conversion will fail assert None

testcase.failure: tests/test_demo_regression.py:97: in test_ffmpeg_available assert path, "ffmpeg binary not found on PATH — OGG->MP3 conversion will fail" E AssertionError: ffmpeg binary not found on PATH — OGG->MP3 conversion will fail E assert None

testcase.name: test_telegram_handler_dispatches_text

failure.message: AssertionError: simulate failed: 500 Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_demo_regression.py:106: in test_telegram_handler_dispatches_text assert r.status_code == 200, f"simulate failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: simulate failed: 500 Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
